biggestWin: Garden hoe became the clear utility breakout.
biggestFlop: Tiny low-commission products did not justify repeat focus.
lessonsLearned: Raised Right wins when the product solves an obvious problem on camera.
whatToTestNextMonth: Water quality testers, garden tools, pest control, patriotic evergreen items.

biggestWin: Peptide books became the breakout category.
lessonsLearned: Truth Tuned Tribe wins when the content teaches and answers a specific question.
whatToTestNextMonth: More wellness books, peptide-adjacent products, fall wellness, tea, supplements.
